workers.name: e2e-in-ci
workers.task: Harden the existing e2e GitHub Actions lane at `.github/workflows/ci.yml` after the 10.8 (a) unblock. Three changes: (1) bump the e2e job `timeout-minutes` from 12 to 15 (the suite has grown from 15 tests / 8 specs to 92 tests / 26 specs, and the 8-spec 10.8 (a) subset alone takes 1.1m locally, so 12m is borderline on a fresh GitHub-hosted runner with cold install + Vite + Fastify boot); (2) fix the `!ant` push-trigger filter to `!ant/**` so it actually excludes the orchestrator's `ant/main` integration pushes (the current `!ant` glob matches the literal branch name `ant` but NOT `ant/main`, defeating the comment at lines 24-28 that says this is a belt-and-suspenders filter); (3) refresh the stale e2e job header comment at line 6 (`E2E (Playwright smoke (15 tests, full stack))` → `E2E (Playwright full stack, 92 tests / 26 specs)`) and the trigger-filter comment block at lines 24-28 to document the `!ant/**` fix. File scope: ONLY `.github/workflows/ci.yml` (one file, ~10-15 line diff). Do NOT touch `playwright.config.ts`, `package.json`, `e2e/`, or any other `src/` consumer. After making the change, run the audit gate suite: (1) `cd web-modern && pnpm playwright test` — full 26-spec suite, 92 tests, all green (this is the gate that confirms 10.8 (a) unblock holds end-to-end); (2) `python3 -c "import yaml; yaml.safe_load(open('.github/workflows/ci.yml'))"` — no parse error; (3) `grep -E 'timeout-minutes: 15' .github/workflows/ci.yml` — hit (confirms bump); (4) `grep -E '!ant/\*\*' .github/workflows/ci.yml` — hit (confirms filter fix). If all 4 pass, commit with message `ci(github): Phase 10.8 (e) bump e2e timeout + fix ant push filter + refresh stale comment — 92 tests across 26 specs`. Push to `ant` and tag `phase10-8-e2e-in-ci-v1`. Write handoff + flip status to STATUS: PASS.
verify: cd web-modern && pnpm playwright test → all 26 specs / 92 tests green
python3 yaml.safe_load on .github/workflows/ci.yml → no parse error
grep 'timeout-minutes: 15' .github/workflows/ci.yml → hit (e2e job only; server + web-modern stay at 8m)
git diff on the branch shows ONLY .github/workflows/ci.yml modified
Commit + push branch wip/phase10-8-e2e-in-ci-e2e-in-ci to ant + tag phase10-8-e2e-in-ci-v1
